plugins.name: code-review-suite
plugins.description: 13 specialist code review agents (incl. ESLint, Ruff, Trivy IaC, JetBrains InspectCode), shared static-analysis include, PR review skill, pre-review and address-pr-comments commands

plugins.name: web-search
plugins.description: Web search via SearXNG — no API key, no tracking

plugins.name: playwright-cli
plugins.description: Browser automation via playwright-cli — testing, form filling, screenshots, data extraction

plugins.name: md-to-clipboard
plugins.description: Convert Markdown to Teams-compatible rich text on the macOS clipboard

plugins.name: pdf-reader
plugins.description: Extract text from any PDF — native text via poppler, scanned/image via tesseract OCR

plugins.name: roslyn-lsp
plugins.description: Solution-aware C# LSP via Microsoft Roslyn + ClaudeCodeRoslynLspProxy. Re-host of unsafePtr/ClaudeCodeRoslynLspProxy (MIT) with locally-tuned defaults

plugins.name: mattpocock-skills
plugins.description: Vendored subset of Matt Pocock's engineering skills (MIT): writing-great-skills, codebase-design, domain-modeling, grill-with-docs, teach — curated to complement the superpowers/code-review stack without conflict
